description: Per-audience Caly Show sing-along episodes - interactive tap-and-sing with mascot.

episodes.title: Caly Seed's Gentle Hello
episodes.description: Soft hello song with hi, love, and gentle waves with family warmth.

beats.lyric: Hi, hi, hi! Soft hello! Tap HI - God loves you so!
Love, love, love! Warm and bright! Tap LOVE - shine your light!
More sweet songs? Gentle and slow! Tap MORE - watch us grow!
Bye bye, little friend! Rest and glow! Tap BYE - soft and low!

episodes.title: Seed's Night Glow Lullaby
episodes.description: Bedtime lullaby with sleep, love, and peaceful night words.

beats.lyric: Sleepy time, sleepy time! Tap SLEEP - rest divine!
Love wraps round you, safe and near! Tap LOVE - angels here!
Night night stars begin to show! Tap NIGHT - soft moon glow!
Bye bye dreams, sweet and slow! Tap BYE - off we go!

episodes.title: Seed's Yummy Praise Song
episodes.description: Mealtime joy: eat, drink, more, and thankful all done.

beats.lyric: Yummy yum! Bless this bite! Tap EAT - what a delight!
Sip and smile, cool and clear! Tap DRINK - thankful cheer!
More please? Gentle and true! Tap MORE - God cares for you!
All done! Full and blessed! Tap ALL DONE - happy rest!

episodes.title: Seed's Soft Feelings Song
episodes.description: Happy, sad, hugs, and love - feelings are okay with Caly.

beats.lyric: Happy face! Joyful day! Tap HAPPY - clap and play!
Sad sometimes - that's okay! Tap SAD - we pray and stay!
Hug please! Warm and tight! Tap HUG PLEASE - love feels right!
Love, love, love from up above! Tap LOVE - gentle dove!

episodes.title: Seed's Peek and Play
episodes.description: Playful peek-a-boo with ball, play, and happy yes.

beats.lyric: Peek peek! Where am I? Tap PEEK - hello sky!
Play time fun for you and me! Tap PLAY - one-two-three!
Bouncy ball goes roll and spin! Tap BALL - let's begin!
Yes! Yes! Good try today! Tap YES - hooray, hooray!

episodes.title: Seed's Family Circle
episodes.description: Mama, dada, love, and hugs - family circle song.

beats.lyric: Mama's here with open arms! Tap MAMA - safe from harm!
Dada cheers you brave and strong! Tap DADA - sing along!
Love connects our family tree! Tap LOVE - you and me!
Hug please! Circle round and round! Tap HUG PLEASE - joy abounds!

episodes.title: Caly's Hello Song
episodes.description: Sprout's classic hello: hi, help, more, and bye on the beat.

beats.lyric: Hi, hi, hi! Wave hello! Tap HI - here we go!
Help is here! Friends draw near! Tap HELP - loud and clear!
More, more, more! Tap the floor! Tap MORE - encore!
Bye bye bye! Wave up high! Tap BYE - see you sky!

episodes.title: Sprout's Help Power Song
episodes.description: Ask for help, say please, and celebrate brave tries.

beats.lyric: Need some help? That's smart and true! Tap HELP - Caly's with you!
Please and thank you - kind and sweet! Tap PLEASE - polite complete!
More fun words? Let's explore! Tap MORE - hear them roar!
Yes you can! Brave heart beats! Tap YES - victory treats!

episodes.title: Sprout's Feelings Dance
episodes.description: Happy, sad, love, and hugs - dance your feelings out.

beats.lyric: Happy dance! Spin around! Tap HAPPY - joyful sound!
Sad days pass - we're still here! Tap SAD - wipe the tear!
Love your neighbor, love your friend! Tap LOVE - hearts ascend!
Hug please! Squeeze so tight! Tap HUG PLEASE - feels just right!

episodes.title: Sprout's Yummy Fun Song
episodes.description: Eat, drink, more, and all done - thankful mealtime fun.

beats.lyric: Crunch and munch - yummy treat! Tap EAT - can't be beat!
Glug glug drink - cool and fine! Tap DRINK - grape or lime!
More please! Seconds please! Tap MORE - taste the breeze!
All done plate! What a feast! Tap ALL DONE - happy beast!

episodes.title: Sprout's Outside Play Song
episodes.description: Go, play, ball, and dog - outdoor adventure sing-along.

beats.lyric: Let's go go go outside today! Tap GO - run and play!
Play ground swings and sunny skies! Tap PLAY - butterflies!
Kick the ball - roll and bounce! Tap BALL - count by ounce!
Woof woof dog! Furry friend! Tap DOG - play won't end!

episodes.title: Sprout's Family Love Song
episodes.description: Mommy, daddy, love, and bye - family gratitude song.

beats.lyric: Mommy loves you day and night! Tap MOMMY - shining light!
Daddy strong and kind and true! Tap DADDY - hugs for you!
Love the gift from God above! Tap LOVE - gentle dove!
Bye for now - see you soon! Tap BYE - afternoon!

episodes.title: Sprout's Gentle Choice Song
episodes.description: Stop, wait, no, and yes - your body, your choice.

beats.lyric: Stop and pause - breathe with me! Tap STOP - count to three!
Wait right here - patience grows! Tap WAIT - calm and slow!
No means no - your voice is strong! Tap NO - sing the song!
Yes when ready - brave and free! Tap YES - that's the key!

episodes.title: Bud's Adventure Hello
episodes.description: Quest begins: hi, help, play, and grateful bye.

beats.lyric: Hi explorer! Quest begins! Tap HI - adventure wins!
Brave help ask - friends unite! Tap HELP - shining light!
Play the path through field and stream! Tap PLAY - teamwork dream!
Bye brave bud - till we meet! Tap BYE - mission complete!

episodes.title: Bud's Kindness Quest
episodes.description: Please, love, share spirit - kindness on the beat.

beats.lyric: Please and thank you - kindness code! Tap PLEASE - gentle road!
Love your neighbor - golden rule! Tap LOVE - Sunday school!
Share your toys and share your time! Tap SHARE - rhythm rhyme!
Thank you God for gifts each day! Tap THANK YOU - hip hooray!

episodes.title: Bud's Feelings Journey
episodes.description: Happy, sad, hurt, and gentle - name what you feel.

beats.lyric: Happy beats - drum and cheer! Tap HAPPY - bright and clear!
Sad is real - we understand! Tap SAD - holding hand!
Hurt? Tell someone - brave and true! Tap HURT - Caly's with you!
Gentle breath in - peace flows through! Tap GENTLE - sky so blue!

episodes.title: Bud's School Day Song
episodes.description: Go, book, wait, and all done - school routine sing-along.

beats.lyric: Time for school - grab your pack! Tap GO - don't look back!
Open book - stories grow! Tap BOOK - read and know!
Wait your turn - patience wins! Tap WAIT - calm begins!
All done! Homework's through! Tap ALL DONE - proud of you!

episodes.title: Bud's Nature Praise
episodes.description: Outside, dog, ball, and play - celebrate God's creation.

beats.lyric: Outside air - warm and bright! Tap OUTSIDE - golden light!
Faithful dog - loyal friend! Tap DOG - play won't end!
Bounce the ball - teamwork call! Tap BALL - give your all!
Play and laugh - grateful heart! Tap PLAY - joyful art!

episodes.title: Bud's Courage and Stop Song
episodes.description: Stop, no, yes, and help - boundaries and bravery.

beats.lyric: Stop signal - body choice! Tap STOP - use your voice!
No is strong - respect your space! Tap NO - winning race!
Yes when ready - try again! Tap YES - sunshine rain!
Ask for help - heroes do! Tap HELP - Caly's crew!

episodes.title: Sprig's Vibe Hello
episodes.description: Cool hello: hi, help, go, and bye at your pace.

beats.lyric: Hey - hi there! Tap HI when ready.
Need help? Totally fine. Tap HELP - you're shining.
Go for it - your call. Tap GO - standing tall.
Bye for now - catch you later. Tap BYE - see you, creator.

episodes.title: Sprig's Gratitude Groove
episodes.description: Thank you, love, happy, and gentle - grateful groove.

beats.lyric: Grateful heart - name your thanks. Tap THANK YOU - joy in ranks.
Love is patient, love is kind. Tap LOVE - peace of mind.
Happy moment - notice it. Tap HAPPY - legit.
Gentle breath - you've got this. Tap GENTLE - gentle bliss.

episodes.title: Sprig's Friendship Beat
episodes.description: Share, please, play, and yes - friendship on the beat.

beats.lyric: Share the moment - pass it on. Tap SHARE - we're strong.
Please goes far - kindness art. Tap PLEASE - from the heart.
Play together - laugh and learn. Tap PLAY - take your turn.
Yes to trying - growth is real. Tap YES - how you feel.

episodes.title: Sprig's Boundary Power
episodes.description: Stop, no, wait, and help - your boundaries matter.

beats.lyric: Stop - pause when you need space. Tap STOP - steady pace.
No is a full sentence. Tap NO - let it show.
Wait - patience is a skill. Tap WAIT - breathe your fill.
Help is strength, not weakness. Tap HELP - calm and meekness.

episodes.title: Sprig's Creative Flow
episodes.description: Book, music, go, and more - creative flow sing-along.

beats.lyric: Open book - worlds unfold. Tap BOOK - stories told.
Music moves - feel the beat. Tap MUSIC - tap your feet.
Go create - make something new. Tap GO - just for you.
More ideas? Keep them flowing. Tap MORE - keep on growing.

episodes.title: Vine's Honest Heart
episodes.description: Sing about truth, respect, and finding your voice with Caly Vine.

beats.lyric: Truth is light - speak with care. Tap TRUTH - stand aware.
Respect goes both ways we share. Tap RESPECT - show you care.
Your VOICE is yours - clear and strong. Tap VOICE - sing your song.
Friends like River walk along. Tap FRIEND - we belong.

episodes.title: Calm Before the Storm
episodes.description: Regulation sing-along with break, breathe, and help.

beats.lyric: Need a BREAK? That is okay. Tap BREAK - pause and play.
BREATHE in slow - let tension go. Tap BREATHE - gentle flow.
Ask for HELP - brave and true. Tap HELP - I am with you.
CALM returns - skies turn blue. Tap CALM - we made it through.

episodes.title: River and Caly Song
episodes.description: Celebrating neurodiverse friendship with Caly's best friend River.

beats.lyric: RIVER waits - that's okay. Tap WAIT - we find our way.
Different minds - gifts to share. Tap FRIEND - love and care.
SHARE the moment, slow or fast. Tap SHARE - friendship lasts.
JOY in being who we are. Tap JOY - near and far.

episodes.title: My Space, My Pace
episodes.description: Assent-first sing-along about boundaries.

beats.lyric: NO is power - use it well. Tap NO - truth to tell.
My SPACE is mine - honor that. Tap SPACE - tit for tat.
YES when ready - not before. Tap YES - open door.
CHOICE is yours - always more. Tap CHOICE - explore.

episodes.title: Evening Glow
episodes.description: Wind-down sing-along for teen band.

beats.lyric: REST your mind - day is done. Tap REST - setting sun.
GRATEFUL heart - count the good. Tap GRATEFUL - understood.
PEACE like leaves in evening air. Tap PEACE - God is there.
NIGHT arrives - soft and deep. Tap NIGHT - gentle sleep.

episodes.title: Morning Grace
episodes.description: Adult Bloom sing-along about gratitude and purpose.

beats.lyric: GRATEFUL for this brand-new day. Tap GRATEFUL - light the way.
SERVE with hands and open heart. Tap SERVE - do your part.
HOPE grows where kindness starts. Tap HOPE - play your part.
LOVE remains when day departs. Tap LOVE - work of art.

episodes.title: Family Circle Song
episodes.description: Mom, dad, little brother, and Caly Bloom together.

beats.lyric: FAMILY circle, strong and wide. Tap FAMILY - side by side.
MOMMY's warmth - gentle guide. Tap MOMMY - by your side.
DADDY's strength - safe inside. Tap DADDY - stride by stride.
LOVE holds all - our joy and pride. Tap LOVE - open wide.

episodes.title: Work and Rest
episodes.description: Balance sing-along for adult learners.

beats.lyric: WORK with purpose, one step more. Tap WORK - shut the door.
REST restores what stress may steal. Tap REST - truly feel.
HELP is strength, not shame to show. Tap HELP - let it flow.
PEACE returns when rhythms grow. Tap PEACE - soft and slow.

episodes.title: Voice Rise
episodes.description: AAC advocacy sing-along.

beats.lyric: Your VOICE matters - never small. Tap VOICE - stand tall.
SPEAK your truth with calm and care. Tap SPEAK - fill the air.
LISTEN deep - others share. Tap LISTEN - show you care.
SHARE the words that set you free. Tap SHARE - harmony.

episodes.title: Evening Thanks
episodes.description: Closing gratitude sing-along.

beats.lyric: THANKS for words we used today. Tap THANKS - grace to stay.
REST your voice - you've had your say. Tap REST - end of day.
HOPE for tomorrow's bright display. Tap HOPE - on the way.
NIGHT brings peace - softly lay. Tap NIGHT - night and day.

episodes.title: Model and Tap Song
episodes.description: Caregiver co-play sing-along for aided language stimulation.

beats.lyric: MODEL the word - slow and clear. Tap MODEL - learner hears.
WAIT for response - patience here. Tap WAIT - drawing near.
CELEBRATE each try with cheer. Tap CELEBRATE - sincere.
HELP when needed, never fear. Tap HELP - always near.

episodes.title: Assent First Lullaby
episodes.description: Honoring skip, pause, and no in sing-along play.

beats.lyric: PAUSE anytime - that's okay. Tap PAUSE - gentle way.
NO means no - we honor that. Tap NO - tit for tat.
YES when ready - patient wait. Tap YES - celebrate.
CHOICE belongs to every mate. Tap CHOICE - assent is great.

episodes.title: Gentle Routine Song
episodes.description: Daily routine words for co-play.

beats.lyric: EAT together - nourish well. Tap EAT - ring the bell.
WASH hands clean - splash and dry. Tap WASH - reach the sky.
PLAY with joy - laugh out loud. Tap PLAY - proud and proud.
SLEEP time comes - soft cloud. Tap SLEEP - rest allowed.

episodes.title: Family Team Song
episodes.description: Caregiver band family circle with Caly Canopy.

beats.lyric: TEAM means all of us as one. Tap TEAM - work begun.
LOVE in action, day by day. Tap LOVE - lead the way.
HELP each other, come what may. Tap HELP - hip hooray.
TOGETHER strong in every way. Tap TOGETHER - stay.

episodes.title: Evening Calm for Caregivers
episodes.description: Wind-down co-regulation sing-along.

beats.lyric: CALM your body, calm your mind. Tap CALM - gentle kind.
BREATHE together, slow and deep. Tap BREATHE - peaceful sleep.
THANKS for showing up today. Tap THANKS - grace to stay.
REST tonight - you've paved the way. Tap REST - end of day.
